- source_rhythm_profile:
  - span: "This here returned undefined"
    event: background_leadin

source_text: This here returned undefined, and so then the second one got returned. While here, in this one, this value was 20, and so it is this 20 that immediately got returned.

  - span: a giant canyon near the equator
    event: pause_before_detail
source_text: Images show the surface of Charon is mostly covered by water ice. We saw steep cliffs and a giant canyon near the equator that stretches more than 600 miles. Scientists also found organic materials on its icy surface.

text:
- register: neutral

- emotion: calm
- intensity: medium
- fluency: fluent
- audio_cues: none
- cutoff_risk: yes
- translation_style:
  - naturalness_target: conversational and natural
  - delivery_feel: storytelling
  - main_warning: avoid over-completing the sentence
- source_rhythm_profile:
  - span: "and spent five years in the Hanoi Hilton with John McCain and."
    event: trailing_emphasis
source_text: My grandfather was a World War II aviator, and my great uncle was an Air Force pilot who was shot down over Vietnam and spent five years in the Hanoi Hilton with John McCain and.

- register: neutral

- source_rhythm_profile:
  - span: "when it comes to our \"quote unquote\" gut instincts"
    event: pause_before_detail
source_text: Harvard Business School professor Laura Huang has also done quite a bit of research when it comes to our "quote unquote" gut instincts, and she discusses the results in her book *Edge: Turning Adversity into Advantage*. She explains how these instincts can lead to some terrible decisions in both work and normal life.
